acceptanceSignals: SvelteKit hooks inject actor context and enforce role guards.
Mock auth works for employee/vendor/admin in dev.

lastCommit.message: feat: implement Authentication Middleware (Mock-Only Phase Scope) (attempt 3)

attempts.latestEventSummary: feature completed: Authentication Middleware (Mock-Only Phase Scope) in 0 attempts

reinforcementResults.name: Contract Lockstep Gate
reinforcementResults.summary: Reviewed against F05 scope and policy: auth is centralized in SvelteKit hooks (`event.locals` injection + role/scope guards), mock-only CLAR-002 enforcement is explicit (`AUTH_PROVIDER` hard-gated to `mock`), and expiry/refresh/tamper paths are handled in runtime/provider logic. Mock auth flows for employee/vendor/admin are implemented and covered by tests. I validated behavior with `node --import tsx --test tests/runtime.test.ts tests/hooks.test.ts` (9/9 passing). No backend handler/OpenAPI/generated-client files changed in this feature branch, so the contract-sync policy is satisfied for this scope.

reinforcementResults.name: Authorization Boundary Gate
reinforcementResults.summary: No current-scope blockers found. Auth is centralized in SvelteKit middleware: actor context injection plus role/permission/scope enforcement are in `apps/web/src/hooks.server.ts`; mock-only provider selection and safe session expiry/refresh/tamper handling are in `apps/web/src/lib/server/auth/runtime.ts` and `apps/web/src/lib/server/auth/mock-provider.ts`; dev mock sign-in for employee/vendor/admin is implemented in `apps/web/src/routes/auth/mock/+server.ts`. Evidence checks are covered by passing web auth tests (`node --import tsx --test tests/**/*.test.ts`) in `apps/web/tests/hooks.test.ts` and `apps/web/tests/runtime.test.ts`.

reinforcementResults.name: No-Legacy/Fallback Gate
reinforcementResults.summary: No blockers found for this feature scope. The SvelteKit `handle` hook centralizes authn/authz, injects actor context (`locals.auth`/`locals.actor`), enforces role and scoped-path guards, and clears invalid sessions. The auth runtime keeps a provider seam (`AuthProvider`) while enforcing CLAR-002 mock-only mode (non-mock providers hard-fail), and safely handles expiry/refresh/tamper cases in the mock provider. Dev mock auth supports employee/vendor/admin. I also verified no ad hoc page-level auth checks or real-provider coupling in the web feature surface. Validation: `cd apps/web && pnpm test` passed (9/9). `pnpm check` could not run in this read-only sandbox because SvelteKit needs to write `.svelte-kit` files.

executionConstraints: Keep provider seam swappable for later real auth.
name: Authentication Middleware (Mock-Only Phase Scope)
rationale: Role-safe access boundaries are required before portal features.
summary: Implement provider-agnostic auth architecture with mock runtime.
